case_for: Cooks flashed some upside as recently as week 13 with a 10.6-point outing, showing he still has weeks where he can approach or clear the threshold if targets and a big play materialize
case_against: His recent form is consistently well below the 12-point threshold, with none of his last six games reaching double digits above 11 and a season-long trend of low, capped production averaging under 8 points
